title: Principal Visual Merchandiser at More Retail

jsonLd.title: Principal Visual Merchandiser at More Retail
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with More Retail! We are hiring a Visual Merchandiser for our Agra team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About More Retail:
More Retail is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in CRM

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Agra, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with More Retail!
